title: Conqueror of The Shadows of Luclin
description: This achievement is gained upon completing all the raids in The Shadows of Luclin.

title: Ring of the Shissar
description: This key unlocks the portal to Emperor Ssraeshza's chambers.

title: The Scepter of Shadows
description: This key unlocks the entrance to Vex Thal.

title: Vex Thal North Tower Key
description: This key unlocks the door to the north tower of Vex Thal.

title: Vex Thal North Wing Key
description: This key unlocks the door to the north wing of Vex Thal.

title: Vex Thal Palace Key
description: This key unlocks the door to the palace within Vex Thal.

title: Zazuzh's Key
description: This key unlocks the door to Rhag`Zadune's wing within Ssraeshza Temple.

title: Zherozsh's Key
description: This key unlocks the door to Xerkizh's wing within Ssraeshza Temple.

title: Earring of the Solstice
description: This achievement is gained upon crafting Xanthe's Earring of Nature.

requirements.label: Liber Brassica Felix v 1-10 - Xanthe's Earring of Nature (or Earring of the Solstice)
